programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal performs a great and fun dance, and everyone is waiting for the award ceremony.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is back to their normal lives, and Tapu Sena plays a prank with Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham Society faces a vegetable shortage when Sunita stops coming to the market.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: An uneducated woman starts a business and tries to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society face real-life challenges and find solutions for it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Ganpat and his family arrive at the school for Tanvi's admission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Ganpat updates the members regarding the school's decision to deny Tanvi admission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Madhavi adopt the guise of a prosperous couple and meet with the school administration.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tanvi poses as Bhide and Madhavi's daughter in front of the school administration.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Dr Hathi diagnoses Sunita with a brain tumour, and she needs to undergo a surgery.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: An accident leaves Dr Dev with an eight-year gap in his memory, forcing him to start over.
